name: HopperRegenAdapterB2B
author: Sacmaj
blurb: Documented negative result for Rule-30 regenerated ternary low-rank adapters. The best filtered regen-adapter ablation is substantially worse than matched base-only at 297 one-H100 steps.
claim_scope: 1xH100 capped-validation non-record evidence; not an 8xH100 leaderboard claim

comparison_summary.interpretation: Skipping Q/K helps, but the current regenerated-adapter design remains much worse than base-only at matched updates.

lineage.parent_summary: Validated seeded Rademacher LoRA at rank 8 with base seed 1729; reached val_bpb 1.42375499 on full WSL Ubuntu 24.04 + RTX 4090 validation. This submission swaps to Rule-30 + Achlioptas {1/4, 1/2, 1/4} ternary regen at rank 16, restructures the adapter as a B2B (back-to-back) micro-GEMM Y = X@W^T + alpha*(X@A^T)@B^T, and adds a CUTLASS WGMMA / WMMA bridge kernel prototype on H100. The composite went backwards at matched 297-step 1xH100 ablations.

not_claimed: final fused CUTLASS WGMMA/TMA trainer backend

compute_request.needed_for: 8xH100 SXM5 production gate plus targeted rank/alpha/placement ablations to confirm-or-refute the 297-step 1xH100 negative result at production batch and step counts.
specific_runs: Rank sweep at smart-role placement: REGEN_RANK in {4, 8, 16, 32} x 3 seeds = 12 runs
Alpha sweep at best rank: REGEN_ALPHA_INIT in {0.0625, 0.125, 0.25} x 3 seeds = 9 runs
Placement sweep at best rank/alpha: all / smart-role / mlp-only / attn-only x 3 seeds = 12 runs
Best-config 8xH100 600s production gate x 3 seeds = 3 runs
compute_request.estimated_cost: ~36 runs at ~10 min each = ~6 8xH100-hours = ~$120 of compute at Runpod 8xH100 SXM rates.
compute_request.rationale: Local hardware is one RTX 4090 (24 GB) and hourly Runpod 1xH100 rentals; the leaderboard validation gate needs 8xH100 SXM that I cannot self-fund. The 297-step 1xH100 ablation is a convergence signal at partial-batch step count, not the production regime.
compute_request.channel: Any formal compute-credit request would go through OpenAI's grant form. This PR is the technical justification.
